CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Continued To Sep-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Aug-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Doucette.
Michael W. Collins, Esq. for Plaintiff: Statens Innkrevingssentral.
Order waiving live Witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Torgeir Hansson as follows:
Principal $67,704.43
Prejudgment Interest $21,943.67
Costs $415.00, for a total of $90,063.10
Counsel to prepare and submit a Judgment with break down from Norwegian Krone to U.S. Dollar.

Aug. 17, 2007
Judgment in U.S. Dollars total of $90,063.10 signed by Comm. Kaplan.
